screens.profile.hint.bio: Tell us a bit about yourself
screens.profile.hint.blockingLabeler: Blocking does not prevent this labeler from placing labels on your account.
screens.profile.hint.germDmInfo: This button lets others open the Germ DM app to send you a message. You can manage its visibility from the Germ DM app, or you can disconnect your Bluesky account from Germ DM altogether by clicking the button below.
screens.profile.hint.labels: Labels are annotations on users and content. They can be used to hide, warn, and categorize the network.
screens.profile.hint.noLabelsDeclared: This labeler hasn't declared what labels it publishes, and may not be active.
screens.profile.hint.subscribePrompt: Subscribe to @{handle} to use these labels:
screens.profile.hint.verificationWarning: You are verified. You will lose your verification status if you change your display name. {#t0}Learn more.{/t0}
